title: Open Dashboard and access detailed Insights from a KPI card
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can view KPI cards on the Dashboard and open the detailed report page from a KPI card.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" option on the gateway screen

title: Dashboard displays core KPI cards (revenue, average ticket, occupancy)
description: Verifies that the Dashboard shows the core KPI cards for business monitoring for an authenticated user.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" option on the gateway screen
Verify text "Ticket médio" (Average ticket) is visible

title: Refresh metrics updates Dashboard visuals
description: Verifies that clicking Refresh metrics triggers the dashboard to update charts/numbers shown to the user.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" option on the gateway screen

title: Open Insights from the Average Ticket KPI card
description: Verifies that the Average Ticket KPI card can be used as a quick action to reach the Insights report page.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" option on the gateway screen
Verify text "Ticket médio" (Average ticket) is visible
Click the "Ticket médio" (Average ticket) KPI card

title: Open Insights from the Occupancy KPI card
description: Verifies that the Occupancy KPI card can be used as a quick action to reach the Insights report page.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" option on the gateway screen

title: Dashboard shows charts and key sections after login
description: Verifies that the Dashboard loads its main visual analytics components (charts/sections) for an authenticated user.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" option on the gateway screen
Verify element "KPI cards section" is visible

title: Weekly view shows appointments laid out by time and staff
description: Verifies a logged-in staff user can switch to weekly view and see the appointment layout in the calendar grid.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" card/button on the gateway screen to proceed to the login form

title: Create appointment successfully and see it on the calendar
description: Verifies a staff user can create an appointment and the new booking appears in the agenda calendar.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" card/button on the gateway screen to proceed to the login form
Type "Cliente Teste" into the client name field

title: Create appointment - select service and save
description: Verifies the appointment creation can be completed after selecting a service, date/time, and saving.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" card/button on the gateway screen to proceed to the login form
Select the first available option from the service dropdown
Select the first available date from the date picker
Select the first available time from the time dropdown

title: After saving, new appointment is visible on the calendar
description: Verifies that saving an appointment results in a visible appointment entry on the agenda calendar.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" card/button on the gateway screen to proceed to the login form
Type "Cliente Visível" into the client name field
Select the first available option from the service dropdown
Select the first available date from the date picker
Select the first available time from the time dropdown

title: Prevent creating appointment in a conflicting time slot
description: Verifies the agenda blocks saving when the selected date/time conflicts with an existing booking and shows a conflict message.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" card/button on the gateway screen to proceed to the login form
Click the first visible appointment on the calendar

title: Conflict error message is shown on save attempt
description: Verifies the user sees an explicit 'unavailable/conflict' error after attempting to save an appointment at a taken time.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" card/button on the gateway screen to proceed to the login form
Click the first visible appointment on the calendar
Select the same visible time shown by the existing appointment from the time dropdown
Verify text "Time unavailable" or "conflito" or "Horário indisponível" is visible

title: Mark an appointment as completed and see status change
description: Verifies a staff user can open an appointment and mark it completed, updating the visible status.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" card/button on the gateway screen to proceed to the login form
Click the first visible appointment on the calendar

title: Completed appointment remains visible in calendar
description: Verifies a completed appointment still appears on the calendar after closing the details view.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" card/button on the gateway screen to proceed to the login form
Click the first visible appointment on the calendar

title: Add a customer to the digital queue with required details
description: Verifies the owner can add a new customer to the 'Aguardando' queue by providing name and service.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" card/button on the gateway screen to proceed to the login form
Click "Fila" in the main navigation menu
Verify text "Adicionar na fila" is visible
Type "Cliente Teste" into the customer name field

title: Call next moves the top waiting customer into service
description: Verifies calling the next customer moves a customer from 'Aguardando' to 'Em Atendimento'.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" card/button on the gateway screen to proceed to the login form
Click "Fila" in the main navigation menu
Type "Cliente Chamar" into the customer name field

title: Validation error when adding to queue without required fields
description: Verifies a validation message appears when trying to add a queue entry without filling required fields.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" card/button on the gateway screen to proceed to the login form
Click "Fila" in the main navigation menu

title: Multiple customers appear in waiting queue after consecutive adds
description: Verifies adding multiple customers results in multiple visible entries in the waiting list.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" card/button on the gateway screen to proceed to the login form
Click "Fila" in the main navigation menu
Type "Cliente 1" into the customer name field
Type "Cliente 2" into the customer name field

title: Queue page loads and shows queue sections for owner
description: Verifies the queue management page renders key sections for managing customers.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" card/button on the gateway screen to proceed to the login form
Click "Fila" in the main navigation menu

title: View clients list and open a client profile
description: Verifies that the user can view the clients list and open a client profile with visit history.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" card/button on the gateway screen to proceed to the login form
Click "Clientes" in the main navigation menu
Verify text "Última visita" (Last visit) is visible
Click on the first client row in the list

title: Search clients by name filters the list
description: Verifies that typing a client name in the search field filters the client list results.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" card/button on the gateway screen to proceed to the login form
Click "Clientes" in the main navigation menu
Type "ana" into the client search field

title: Search with no matches shows empty state
description: Verifies the UI behavior when the search query returns no matching clients.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" card/button on the gateway screen to proceed to the login form
Click "Clientes" in the main navigation menu
Type "zzzz_nonexistent_client_123" into the client search field
Verify text "Nenhum cliente encontrado" (No clients found) is visible

title: Clear search restores the full client list
description: Verifies that clearing the search input restores the unfiltered list of clients.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" card/button on the gateway screen to proceed to the login form
Click "Clientes" in the main navigation menu
Type "ana" into the client search field
Click the "Clear search" (X) control in the search field

title: Add client: missing contact shows validation error
description: Verifies that the Add Client form blocks saving when contact is missing and shows the required validation message.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" card/button on the gateway screen to proceed to the login form
Click "Clientes" in the main navigation menu
Verify element "Add client form" is visible
Type "Cliente Teste" into the name field

title: Add client form can be cancelled without saving
description: Verifies that the user can cancel out of the Add Client flow and return to the clients list without saving.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" card/button on the gateway screen to proceed to the login form
Click "Clientes" in the main navigation menu
Verify element "Add client form" is visible

title: Client profile view shows key sections
description: Verifies that the client profile page shows core sections such as contact information and visit history.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" card/button on the gateway screen to proceed to the login form
Click "Clientes" in the main navigation menu
Click on the first client row in the list

title: View cashflow charts on Finance page (daily and monthly)
description: Verifies the Finance page loads and displays daily and monthly cashflow charts for an authenticated user.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" card/button on the gateway screen to proceed to the login form
Click "Financeiro" in the main navigation menu
Verify text "Fluxo de caixa" is visible

title: Open a specific day to view that day's transactions
description: Verifies selecting a date on the Finance page shows transactions for that specific day.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" card/button on the gateway screen to proceed to the login form
Click "Financeiro" in the main navigation menu
Click on a visible date in the cashflow view (a day with activity if available)

title: Add an Income transaction and verify it appears in the ledger
description: Verifies a user can add a transaction with a valid amount and type and see it listed in the ledger.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" card/button on the gateway screen to proceed to the login form
Click "Financeiro" in the main navigation menu
Select "Entrada" (Income) from the transaction type dropdown

title: Add an Expense transaction and verify it appears in the ledger
description: Verifies a user can add an expense transaction and see it listed in the ledger.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" card/button on the gateway screen to proceed to the login form
Click "Financeiro" in the main navigation menu
Select "Saída" (Expense) from the transaction type dropdown

title: Validation: amount required when saving a transaction with empty amount
description: Verifies the form blocks saving and shows an 'amount required' validation message when amount is empty.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" card/button on the gateway screen to proceed to the login form
Click "Financeiro" in the main navigation menu

title: Cancel/close Add transaction without saving
description: Verifies the user can exit the add transaction flow without creating a new ledger entry.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" card/button on the gateway screen to proceed to the login form
Click "Financeiro" in the main navigation menu

title: Ledger visibility after adding a transaction (recent entry present)
description: Verifies that after saving a transaction, the ledger section is visible and shows the new entry contextually.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" card/button on the gateway screen to proceed to the login form
Click "Financeiro" in the main navigation menu
Select "Entrada" (Income) from the transaction type dropdown

title: Generate a campaign from a template and view generated copy and CTA
description: Verifies a user can generate a marketing campaign from a template and see the generated content.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" card/button on the gateway screen to proceed to the login form
Select a campaign template from the template selector

title: Apply target audience filter and generate campaign successfully
description: Verifies filling a target audience filter and generating a campaign shows the generated copy and CTA.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" card/button on the gateway screen to proceed to the login form
Fill a target audience filter field with "Clientes inativos 30 dias"

title: Generated campaign content is displayed after clicking Generate
description: Verifies that generated campaign copy becomes visible after generation is triggered.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" card/button on the gateway screen to proceed to the login form

title: Send campaign and confirm queued success message
description: Verifies a user can send a campaign and sees a success confirmation that it was queued.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" card/button on the gateway screen to proceed to the login form
Click the "Confirm" button in the confirmation dialog

title: Cancel send campaign from confirmation dialog
description: Verifies cancelling the send confirmation does not show the queued success message.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" card/button on the gateway screen to proceed to the login form
Click the "Cancel" button in the confirmation dialog
Verify text "campaign queued" is not visible

title: Generate campaign with insufficient data shows required info error
description: Verifies attempting to generate without sufficient business info or segment shows an error message.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" card/button on the gateway screen to proceed to the login form
Verify text "provide business info or customer segment" is visible

title: Switching templates updates the selected template on the page
description: Verifies that selecting a different campaign template reflects on screen before generating.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" card/button on the gateway screen to proceed to the login form
Select a campaign template named "Reativação" from the template selector

title: Marketing page loads key actions (Generate and Send) for authenticated user
description: Verifies the Marketing Copilot page renders primary actions for an authenticated user.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" card/button on the gateway screen to proceed to the login form

title: View Insights page and confirm revenue and occupancy charts are visible
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can open Insights and see the main revenue and occupancy charts.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" card/button on the gateway screen to proceed to the login form
Click on "Insights" in the main navigation menu

title: Change timeframe and verify charts update
description: Verifies that changing the timeframe on Insights updates the displayed charts for revenue/occupancy.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" card/button on the gateway screen to proceed to the login form
Click on "Insights" in the main navigation menu
Click on the timeframe option "Últimos 30 dias"

title: Switch timeframe to another option and verify the selection changes
description: Verifies that a user can switch between two different timeframe options and the UI reflects the new selection.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" card/button on the gateway screen to proceed to the login form
Click on "Insights" in the main navigation menu
Click on the timeframe option "Últimos 7 dias"

title: Export report flow shows export format options
description: Verifies that initiating an export presents the user with export format choices (e.g., CSV).

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" card/button on the gateway screen to proceed to the login form
Click on "Insights" in the main navigation menu

title: Select a timeframe with no data and confirm empty-state message
description: Verifies that selecting a timeframe that has no records shows the expected 'No data available' empty state message.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" card/button on the gateway screen to proceed to the login form
Click on "Insights" in the main navigation menu
Verify text "No data available for selected period" is visible

title: Insights charts remain visible after changing timeframe multiple times
description: Verifies the Insights page remains stable and charts stay visible after multiple timeframe changes.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" card/button on the gateway screen to proceed to the login form
Click on "Insights" in the main navigation menu
Click on the timeframe option "Este mês"
Click on the timeframe option "Mês passado"

title: Join queue successfully and receive status link
description: Verifies a customer can join a business queue and receives a confirmation showing position and a link to the status page.

steps.description: Navigate to the public queue join page for a valid business queue URL (a /queue/... address provided by the environment).
Type "Alex Customer" into the customer name field.

title: Open queue status page directly and see position + ETA
description: Verifies the queue status page shows the customer’s current position and an estimated wait time.

steps.description: Navigate to a valid queue status page URL (a /queue-status/... address provided by the environment).

title: Refresh queue status updates the displayed status
description: Verifies the Refresh action on the status page triggers a visible update to the status information (or a visible last-updated indicator).

steps.description: Navigate to a valid queue status page URL (a /queue-status/... address provided by the environment).

title: Attempt to join when queue is closed shows error
description: Verifies a customer cannot join a queue that is closed and sees the expected error message.

steps.description: Navigate to the public queue join page for a business queue that is configured as closed (a /queue/... address provided by the environment).
Type "Jamie Customer" into the customer name field.
Verify text "Queue closed or not accepting entries" is visible.

title: Join queue with empty name is blocked with validation message
description: Verifies the join form enforces entering a customer name before joining the queue.

steps.description: Navigate to the public queue join page for a valid business queue URL (a /queue/... address provided by the environment).

title: Queue join page loads and shows required input controls
description: Verifies the public queue join page renders the expected UI elements for joining.

steps.description: Navigate to the public queue join page for a valid business queue URL (a /queue/... address provided by the environment).

title: Invalid or non-existent queue status page shows not-found style message
description: Verifies that opening a non-existent queue status page shows a user-friendly error instead of a blank page.

steps.description: Navigate to a queue status page URL that is known to be invalid in the environment (a /queue-status/... address provided by the environment).

title: Joining queue produces a status page URL containing /queue-status/
description: Verifies the confirmation flow leads to a URL that clearly routes to the status page.

steps.description: Navigate to the public queue join page for a valid business queue URL (a /queue/... address provided by the environment).

title: Profit Radar - Verify Recoverable Revenue display
description: Verifies that the Profit Radar card is visible on the Dashboard and displays potential revenue from at-risk clients.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" option on the gateway screen
Verify text "Radar de Lucro" is visible

title: Visual Engine - Dynamic Theme Switching
description: Verifies that changing theme in settings correctly updates the visual style of the application.

steps.description: Click the "Barbearia" option on the gateway screen
Click on theme toggle to switch to "Beauty"
Verify that visual elements use Beauty theme styles (gradients/rounded)
